violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration . - Dishwasher found at 0ppm CL, moved dishwashing to 3 comp sink till fixed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --- Install baseboard in dishroom and other kitchen areas where are openings between wall and floors. - Dishroom: at some point must repaint/repair floor where paint peeled exposed rough concrete.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
